tldr: Renewed conflict between the United States and Iran has escalated, involving US strikes, Iranian retaliation targeting US allies and tankers, and the US announcing a blockade of the Strait of Hormuz.
This escalation has led to a jump in oil prices, contributing to a decline in global stock markets and an increase in bond yields.
Japan has developed an innovative method capable of recovering up to 90% of lithium from used electric vehicle batteries.

market.why: Global stock markets, including the S&P 500 and Nasdaq Composite, closed lower as rising oil prices and escalating Middle East tensions between the US and Iran increased expectations for interest rate hikes. Analysts are now pricing in further rate rises, which typically weighs on stock performance.

yield_10y.why: The 10-year Treasury yield rose, driven by the renewed US-Iran conflict and the resulting jump in oil and gas prices, which intensified expectations for future interest rate increases.

vix.why: The VIX, a measure of market volatility, increased amid heightened geopolitical tensions from the escalating conflict between the US and Iran, the jump in oil prices, and the associated uncertainty surrounding future interest rate policy.

tech.summary: Japan has developed a method to recover up to 90% of lithium from used electric vehicle batteries, addressing critical resource recycling for the EV industry.
PsiQuantum is developing a plan to construct a massive quantum computer utilizing light, with the machine expected to be housed in a specialized cold environment.
Reflect Orbital has received clearance from the US Federal Communications Commission (FCC) to launch its first prototype space mirror, designed to redirect sunlight to Earth at night.

world.summary: Explosions were reported across Iran, with Iranian cruise missiles hitting two oil tankers in the Strait of Hormuz, killing one crew member and wounding eight, while the US continued its third night of strikes on Iran.
The United States announced plans to reinstate a blockade on the Strait of Hormuz, and Iran retaliated with strikes on US allies Bahrain and Jordan, further escalating tensions in the Middle East.
Russia is preparing to reroute exports from the Sea of Azov following Ukrainian drone attacks that reportedly hit 11 Russian vessels, including tankers, dry cargo ships, and a tugboat.
